---
title: "Data Cleaning"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data Cleaning for StatProg2 Project

*-by Felix Obermaier und Lukas Seibold*

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

owid_covid <- read.csv("data/owid-covid-data.csv")
view(owid_covid)
```

First we want to filter the Dataset by country. We are only looking at covid data for germany:

```{r}
covid_germany_unclean <- owid_covid %>% filter(iso_code == "DEU")
```

Now we want to remove all variables that only contain NAs:

```{r}
covid_germany <- covid_germany_unclean %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
```

In our Proposal we are going to work with the now cleaned dataset `covid_germany`.
